questions.question: How many species of sea turtles are there in the world? / உலகில் மொத்தம் எத்தனை வகையான கடல் ஆமை இனங்கள் உள்ளன?
questions.explanation: There are seven species of sea turtles worldwide.

questions.question: Which is the smallest sea turtle species? / மிகச்சிறிய கடல் ஆமை இனம் எது?
questions.explanation: The Olive Ridley is the smallest and most common sea turtle.

questions.question: What is the maximum weight of a fully grown Leatherback turtle? / முழுமையாக வளர்ந்த லெதர்பேக் ஆமையின் அதிகபட்ச எடை எவ்வளவு?
questions.explanation: A fully grown Leatherback can weigh up to 700 kg.

questions.question: Where do sea turtles spend their entire lives? / கடல் ஆமைகள் தங்கள் வாழ்நாள் முழுவதையும் எங்கே கழிக்கின்றன?
questions.explanation: Sea turtles spend almost their entire life in the ocean.

questions.question: Why do sea turtles come to the shore? / கடல் ஆமைகள் ஏன் கரைக்கு வருகின்றன?
questions.explanation: Turtles come ashore only to lay their eggs.

questions.question: In which months do Olive Ridleys come to the beach? / ஆலிவ் ரிட்லி ஆமைகள் எந்த மாதங்களில் கடற்கரைக்கு வருகின்றன?
questions.explanation: Between January and March, Olive Ridleys come ashore at night to lay their eggs.

questions.question: How deep is the nest cavity dug by the turtle? / ஆமை தோண்டும் முட்டை குழியின் ஆழம் எவ்வளவு?
questions.explanation: The turtle digs a hollow 45 cm deep to lay its eggs.

questions.question: What is the shape and size of a sea turtle's egg? / கடல் ஆமையின் முட்டை எந்த வடிவம் மற்றும் அளவில் இருக்கும்?
questions.explanation: The eggs are similar in shape and size to a table tennis ball.

questions.question: What helps the eggs to hatch? / முட்டைகள் பொரிப்பதற்கு எது உதவுகிறது?
options: c) Body heat of the mother
questions.explanation: The warmth of the sun incubates and hatches the eggs.

questions.question: Out of 1000 hatchlings, how many reach adulthood? / 1000 குஞ்சுகளில் எத்தனை வளர்ந்த ஆமையாக மாறுகின்றன?
questions.explanation: Scientists estimate that only one in every 1000 hatchlings reaches adulthood.

questions.question: What body part does a sea turtle use for swimming? / கடல் ஆமை நீந்துவதற்கு எந்த உறுப்பைப் பயன்படுத்துகிறது?
questions.explanation: Sea turtles use their large, paddle-like flippers to swim.

questions.question: At what time do female turtles usually come ashore? / பெண் ஆமைகள் வழக்கமாக எந்த நேரத்தில் கரைக்கு வருகின்றன?
questions.explanation: Most sea turtles come ashore at night to lay their eggs.

questions.question: What is the meaning of 'Camouflage'? / 'Camouflage' என்பதன் பொருள் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Camouflage means hiding something by making it look like its surroundings.

questions.question: What is an 'egg-tooth'? / 'egg-tooth' என்பது என்ன?
options: c) A tiny notch to break the shell
questions.answer: c) A tiny notch to break the shell
questions.explanation: It's a tiny point at the tip of a hatchling's snout used to break open the egg shell.

questions.question: How many days does it take for eggs to hatch? / முட்டைகள் பொரிய எத்தனை நாட்கள் ஆகும்?
questions.explanation: The incubation period is generally 45 to 60 days.

questions.question: What is the weight of a tiny hatchling? / ஒரு ஆமைக் குஞ்சின் எடை எவ்வளவு?
questions.explanation: Each hatchling weighs less than 20 grams.

questions.question: Which animal is a predator of turtle eggs? / ஆமை முட்டைகளைத் தின்னும் விலங்கு எது?
questions.explanation: Dogs and pigs are among the animals that dig up and eat the eggs.

questions.question: Which animal eats hatchlings on the beach? / கடற்கரையில் ஆமைக் குஞ்சுகளைத் தின்னும் உயிரி எது?
questions.explanation: Crabs and birds often eat the tiny hatchlings as they crawl to the sea.

questions.question: What does 'Marine' mean? / 'Marine' என்பதன் பொருள் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Marine relates to things found in or produced by the sea.

questions.question: What is a 'Species'? / 'Species' என்பது என்ன?
options: a) A group of similar animals/plants
c) A part of a tree
questions.answer: a) A group of similar animals/plants
questions.explanation: A species is a group of living things that can breed together.

questions.question: Why do turtles lay so many eggs? / ஆமைகள் ஏன் இவ்வளவு அதிகமான முட்டைகள் இடுகின்றன?
options: b) To play in the sand
d) To ensure survival of the species
questions.answer: d) To ensure survival of the species
questions.explanation: Since most hatchlings die, laying many eggs helps some survive to adulthood.

questions.question: Where is the egg-tooth located? / முட்டைப் பல் எங்கே அமைந்துள்ளது?
questions.explanation: It's a small notch on the snout of the baby turtle.

questions.question: Is a sea turtle the same as a land tortoise? / கடல் ஆமையும் நில ஆமையும் ஒன்றா?
questions.explanation: Sea turtles live in the sea and have flippers; tortoises live on land and have legs.

questions.question: How many species of sea turtles are found in India? / இந்தியாவில் எத்தனை வகையான கடல் ஆமைகள் காணப்படுகின்றன?
questions.explanation: Five species (Olive Ridley, Hawksbill, Green Sea Turtle, Loggerhead, and Leatherback) are found in India.

questions.question: What is the length of a Leatherback turtle? / லெதர்பேக் ஆமையின் நீளம் எவ்வளவு?
questions.explanation: A fully grown Leatherback can grow to a length of 2.2 meters.

questions.question: Do mother turtles stay to protect the eggs? / தாய் ஆமைகள் முட்டைகளைப் பாதுகாக்கக் காத்திருக்குமா?
questions.explanation: Mother turtles leave immediately after laying and covering the eggs.

questions.question: What do hatchlings do after coming out of the sand? / மணலிலிருந்து வெளியே வந்ததும் குஞ்சுகள் என்ன செய்யும்?
questions.explanation: They instinctively head straight towards the safety of the ocean.

questions.question: Why is it hard for turtles to walk on land? / ஆமைகளால் நிலத்தில் நடப்பது ஏன் கடினம்?
options: a) Flippers are made for swimming, not walking
d) They are afraid of sand
questions.answer: a) Flippers are made for swimming, not walking
questions.explanation: Their limbs are paddle-like flippers, which are clumsy for land movement.

questions.question: What is the common species seen nesting on Indian coasts? / இந்தியக் கடற்கரையில் முட்டையிட வரும் பொதுவான இனம் எது?
questions.explanation: The Olive Ridley is the most common sea turtle found nesting in India.

questions.question: What is the name for animals that hunt others? / பிற விலங்குகளை வேட்டையாடும் உயிரினங்களின் பெயர் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Predators are animals that catch and eat other animals.
